---
title: "basic_stat_comparison"
author: "subhash"
date: "2024-03-19"
output: NULL
DATA : "sorghum_SAP_genotype basic statistics calculation"
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('..//')) 
```
libraries used for calculating basic stats

```{r}
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("ggplot2")
#install.packages("vcfR")
#install.packages("ggplot2")
#install.packages("data.table")
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(vcfR)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
```


plotting basic statistics graphs from the plink2.0 out put data

```{r}
#all the output files are otained from plink2.0    allele frequency = --freq , missing rate = --misssing  
#from PLINK2.0
#reading the data frame
var_freq <- read_delim("data/basic_statistics/ID.afreq", delim = "\t") 
#data
head(var_freq)
#calculating refrence allele frreequency since plink2.0 has calcuated only alternative allele
var_freq$REF_FREQS <- 1 - var_freq$ALT_FREQS
#minimum freequency of alt or ref
var_freq$maf <- pmin(var_freq$ALT_FREQS, var_freq$REF_FREQS)
#looking at the data frame
head(var_freq) 
#normal R base histogram
#hist(var_freq$maf,breaks = 50)
#using ggplot to create a histogram of minor allele freequency
ggplot(var_freq, aes(x = maf)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "blue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Minor Allele Frequency", x = "MAF", y = "Count") + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

#plotting the graph of missing rate from plink2.0
var_miss <- read_delim("data/basic_statistics/ID.vmiss", delim = "\t") #reading the data frame
head(var_miss)
#hist(var_miss$F_MISS,breaks = 50) #basic R plotting
ggplot(var_miss, aes(x = F_MISS)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "blue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of variant missing rate from PLINK2.0", x = "missing rate", y = "Count (Variants)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

#plotting observed heterozygosity using plink2.0
het = fread("data/basic_statistics/ID.hardy")
ggplot(het, aes(x = `O(HET_REF)`)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "blue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Heterozygosity rate from PLINK2.0", x = "Heterozygosity rate", y = "Count (Variants)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
```



manuall calculation and plotting graphs 
missing rate calculation manually

```{r}
#using vcfR library to read the subset of raw vcf file
vcf <- read.vcfR("data/basic_statistics/SAP_subset.vcf") 
geno_matrix <- extract.gt(vcf)
#reading the genotyoe file into dataframe.
geno_df <- as.data.frame(geno_matrix) 
#look at the data frame
head(geno_df)

#caclculation of missing rate manually
missing_rate_variant <- apply(geno_df, 1, function(x) mean(is.na(x))) #calculating fraction of missing rate.
var_miss_manual <- data.frame(ID = rownames(geno_df), missing_rate_variant = missing_rate_variant)
ggplot(var_miss_manual, aes(x = missing_rate_variant)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "green", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of variant missing rate manual", x = "missing rate", y = "Count (Variants)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
```
heterozygosity rate calculation manually

```{r}
#calculating heterozygosity manually
#calculating expected hetrozygosity
#manual_allele_freq$het = 2 * manual_allele_freq$ref * manual_allele_freq$alt
#using function to calculate observed heterozygosity
hetero = apply(geno_df, 1, function(x) {
  N = ncol(geno_df)
  heterozygotes_count = sum(x == "0/1" | x == "0|1", na.rm = TRUE)
  obs_het = heterozygotes_count/N
  return(obs_het)}
)
heterozygosity = data.frame(ID = rownames(geno_df), hetero)
ggplot(heterozygosity, aes(x = hetero)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "green", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of observed heterozygosity", x = "rate of heterozygosity", y = "Count (Variants)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
```

minor allele freequency calculation manually

```{r}
#function to calculate allele freequencies
maf = function(ro){
  ro=as.character(ro)
  ro=sapply(ro,function(x){gsub("\\|","/",x)})
  a1=sapply(ro, function(x){strsplit(x,split = "/")})
  a1=unlist(a1)
  b=as.data.frame(table(a1))
  b[b[,1]=="0" |b[,1]=="1" ,]
  b=b[order(b[,1]),]
  total_count = sum(b$Freq)
  freq1 = b$Freq/total_count
  k=min(freq1)
  k
}
#maf(g1)
m=apply(geno_df,1,maf)
m1=data.frame(ID=rownames(geno_df),MAF=m)
#hist(m1$MAF,breaks = 50)
ggplot(m1, aes(x = MAF)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "green", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "MAF_manual", x = "MAF", y = "Count") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
```

comparing manual calculation and plink2.0 out put 

```{r}
#comparing allele frequency from manual calculation to Plink2.0
mscat <- merge(m1, var_freq, by = "ID")
mscat <- mscat[, c("ID", "MAF", "maf")]
#scatter plot for allele freequency comparision
ggplot(af_df, aes(x = MAF, y = maf)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "minor allele freequency",
       x = "Manual Calculation", y = "Plink2.0") +
  theme_minimal()

#comparing manually calculated and Plink2.0 calculated variant missing rate with scatter plot
comp_var_miss <- merge(var_miss_manual, var_miss, by = "ID")
comp_var_miss <- comp_var_miss[, c("ID", "missing_rate_variant", "F_MISS")]
#scatterplot for variant missingrate
ggplot(comp_var_miss, aes(x = missing_rate_variant, y = F_MISS)) +
  geom_point() +  # This adds the scatter plot points
  labs(title = "Scatter Plot of variant missing rate comparision",
       x = "Manual_calculation", y = "Plink2.0") +
  theme_minimal() 

#comparing heterozygosity
comp_het = merge(heterozygosity, het, by = "ID")
comp_het <- comp_het[, c("ID", "hetero", "O(HET_REF)")]
comp_het$`O(HET_REF)` = round(comp_het$`O(HET_REF)`, 4)
ggplot(comp_het, aes(x = hetero, y = `O(HET_REF)`)) +
  geom_point() +  # This adds the scatter plot points
  labs(title = "Scatter Plot of heterozygosity rate comparision",
       x = "Manual_calculation", y = "Plink2.0") +
  theme_minimal()  
```
